name: Anna Klein
bio: Built Lattica from Berlin to a $42M ARR enterprise AI platform. Closed first US Fortune 100 logo in 2024 and opened a New York office the same year. Previously ran EMEA sales at Datadog.

name: James Okonkwo
bio: Scaled Northwind from a London garage to a $90M ARR developer infrastructure company with offices in San Francisco and London. Closed a $120M Series C from Insight in 2025 after a 2-year US push.

name: Marta Costa
bio: Hagal Health serves 1,800 clinics across Europe and just opened a US commercial office. Raised $48M Series B in 2024 led by an NYC fund. Previously held GTM roles at Veeva.

name: Henrik Lindqvist
bio: Nordkapp helps Nordic banks run treasury operations. $14M ARR, 80% gross margin, just completed Series A. Considering a US move but undecided. Previously product lead at Klarna.

name: Priya Raman
bio: Founded Castline, a sales enablement platform, in London. Opened US commercial in 2021 and grew it to 70% of revenue before selling to a NASDAQ-listed acquirer in 2024 for $310M.

name: Tomáš Dvořák
bio: Prahova ships an open-source vector database used by 14,000 teams. Series A from Index Ventures. PLG-driven, no outbound sales motion yet. Considering a sales-led layer for enterprise.

name: Sophie Laurent
bio: Aviron designs at-home rowing machines for the European market. Pre-launch hardware brand, 2,200 pre-orders. First-time founder. Looking for help on supply chain and DTC channels.

name: Diego Morales
bio: Quanto is a treasury platform for mid-market European businesses. Raised $55M Series B led by Bessemer NY in 2024. Spent 18 months opening US GTM out of Miami. Has strong views on which US funds add real GTM help versus brand.

name: Caroline Hughes
bio: Tideline is a pre-launch consumer social app for outdoor swimmers. £400k pre-seed from angels. First-time founder, ex-product at Strava.

name: Lukas Meier
bio: Voltklar sells grid-management SaaS to European utilities. $36M Series B in 2024, all-European customer base. Considering US expansion but cautious about regulatory differences.

name: Irene Kovács
bio: Cinder is a restaurant POS platform with 600 venue customers across 8 European countries. Series A from Speedinvest. Just hired a US-based head of sales and is 4 months into a US pilot.

name: Oliver Park
bio: Greylake spun out of Imperial College in 2024 building warehouse robotics arms. Seed round of $7M from a UK deep-tech fund. Pre-revenue, three pilot customers.
